routines.name: Wiki health
routines.cadence: weekly, before large features, and after imports
routines.purpose: Catch broken wiki structure, broken links, and stale product-wiki hygiene before the agent relies on it.
routines.agent_follow_up: Use reconcile-wiki for stale drafts, missing links, or judgement calls.

routines.name: Traceability drift
routines.cadence: after implementation and in scheduled maintenance
routines.purpose: Keep proposals, acceptance criteria, and check coverage linked.
routines.agent_follow_up: Use reconcile-wiki when a missing link needs product judgement.

routines.name: Verification
routines.cadence: before accepting implementation and in CI
routines.purpose: Run the executable checks that prove product-wiki claims.
routines.agent_follow_up: Use generate-checks if an active acceptance criterion lacks executable coverage.

routines.name: Architecture drift
routines.cadence: after several features or when refactor pressure appears
routines.purpose: Enforce intent traceability (active criteria trace to approval; executable checks trace to criteria), then prompt agent review for judgement calls like duplicate capabilities.
routines.agent_follow_up: Use review-architecture for duplicate capabilities or decisions contradicted by code, then raise a proposal if a refactor needs approval.

routines.name: Design drift
routines.purpose: Compare UI implementation against the product wiki's design-system intent.
routines.agent_follow_up: Use reconcile-wiki and generate-checks for design-system gaps.
